testcase.name: outOfOrderScenarioCausesOrderingViolations

testcase.name: disconnectPausesEmission
testcase.system-out: 19:37:51.228 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-156] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator starting feedId=int-disconnect mode=SCENARIO ticksPerSecond=1000 19:37:51.228 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-156] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting DISCONNECT feedId=int-disconnect 19:37:51.238 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-156] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting DISCONNECT feedId=int-disconnect 19:37:51.249 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-156] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting DISCONNECT feedId=int-disconnect 19:37:51.262 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-156] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator stopped feedId=int-disconnect ticksSent=3 totalFailures=3

testcase.name: throttleBurstFloodsThroughputValidator
testcase.system-out: 19:37:51.263 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-157] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator starting feedId=int-throttle-burst mode=SCENARIO ticksPerSecond=1000 19:37:51.277 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-157] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator stopped feedId=int-throttle-burst ticksSent=800 totalFailures=1

testcase.name: duplicateTickScenarioCountsDuplicates
testcase.system-out: 19:37:51.277 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-158] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator starting feedId=int-duplicate mode=SCENARIO ticksPerSecond=1000 19:37:51.303 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-158] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator stopped feedId=int-duplicate ticksSent=50 totalFailures=25

testcase.name: staleTimestampScenarioCausesLatencyValidatorToFail

testcase.name: reconnectStormCompletesWithoutError
testcase.system-out: 19:37:51.562 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator starting feedId=int-reconnect-storm mode=SCENARIO ticksPerSecond=1000 19:37:51.562 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting RECONNECT_STORM feedId=int-reconnect-storm disconnectCount=1 19:37:51.567 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting RECONNECT_STORM feedId=int-reconnect-storm disconnectCount=2 19:37:51.573 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting RECONNECT_STORM feedId=int-reconnect-storm disconnectCount=3 19:37:51.579 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting RECONNECT_STORM feedId=int-reconnect-storm disconnectCount=4 19:37:51.586 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T injecting RECONNECT_STORM feedId=int-reconnect-storm disconnectCount=5 19:37:51.592 &amp#27;[34mINFO &amp#27;[0;39m [virtual-169] &amp#27;[36mc.m.v.simulator.LVWRChaosSimulator&amp#27;[0;39m - LVWR_T simulator stopped feedId=int-reconnect-storm ticksSent=5 totalFailures=5
